_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.

preauth.label: Clinical Notes with history and examination and planned line of treatment
LFT with Bilirubin, RFT, Coagulation Profile and Serum Electrolytes
CT Abdomen / Endoscopic Retrograde Cholangiopancreatography (ERCP) / Magnetic Resonance Cholangiopancreatography (MRCP) Report showing stricture

ppd_preauth.q: Were the patient's clinical history/investigations indicative of the Procedure?
Whether the investigation reports confirm the diagnosis?

cpd_claim.q: Whether the detailed procedure notes confirm the procedure claimed?

common_queries: Patient's clinical history/investigations not indicative of the procedure.
Investigation reports do not confirm the diagnosis.
Detailed procedure notes do not confirm the procedure claimed.
Missing or incomplete LFT, RFT, Coagulation Profile, or Serum Electrolytes at pre-auth.
Missing USG Abdomen, CT Abdomen, ERCP, or MRCP report showing stricture at pre-auth.
Missing Intra Operative Clinical Photograph at claim submission.

clinical_key_pointers: Hepatico-Jejunostomy is the surgical creation of a communication between the hepatic duct and jejunum.
contraindications: Patients with severe systemic illnesses such as severe cardiac or pulmonary dysfunction
Presence of a proximal obstruction to bile flow
